title: bromus secalinus f. divergens
intro: Bromus secalinus f. divergens, also known as wild brome or false brome, is a subspecies of grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Bromus secalinus f. divergens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be dried and used in herbal remedies.
